meaning: n.[植]产黄色木材的各种树,黄色木材,香槐
examples: Viewer friends, this is that old yellowwood tree.
But finding out which one is the yellowwood tree has to depend on your judgment.
The steles, the Nine-Dragon Plaque and the yellowwood tree are the three treasures of Chen's residence. Now we've found them all.
In Graaff-Reinet, historical accommodation options include Camdeboo Cottages, comprising nine 19th-century cottages with original yellowwood floors and reed ceilings alongside modern amenities.
